name: Backend Development Using Node.js
description:
The Backend Development Using Node.js Bootcamp is designed for students and beginners who want to learn server-side web development using modern JavaScript technologies. This bootcamp provides hands-on learning experience in building scalable backend applications, creating APIs, handling databases, and understanding real-world backend architecture using Node.js and Express.js.

Participants will gain practical knowledge of backend concepts through live coding sessions, projects, and exercises. By the end of the bootcamp, learners will be able to develop REST APIs, manage servers, connect databases, and build complete backend systems for web applications.

sessions.details:
Topics Covered:
Introduction to Backend Development
Understanding Client-Server Architecture
Introduction to Node.js and its Features
Installing Node.js and Setting Up Environment
Working with REPL (Read-Eval-Print Loop)
Understanding Modules in Node.js
Using Built-in Modules (fs, http, path, etc.)
Introduction to NPM (Node Package Manager)
Creating Basic HTTP Server
Handling File Operations using fs Module
sessions.session_name: Session 1: Introduction to Node.js & Backend Fundamentals

sessions.details:
Topics Covered:
Introduction to Express.js Framework
Creating Web Servers with Express
Routing in Express.js
Handling GET, POST, PUT, DELETE Requests
Understanding Middleware
Working with JSON Data
Building REST APIs
Form Handling and Request Processing
Error Handling in Express Applications

Topics Covered:
Introduction to Databases
Connecting MongoDB with Node.js
Understanding Mongoose ODM
Creating Database Schemas and Models
Performing CRUD Operations with Database
Authentication Basics
Environment Variables and Security
Project Structure Best Practices
Deploying Backend Applications
Introduction to Real-World Backend Projects

name: React JS
description:
The React JS Bootcamp is a practical and beginner-friendly training program designed to help participants learn modern frontend web development using React.js. This bootcamp focuses on building interactive, responsive, and dynamic web applications while providing hands-on experience with real-world projects and industry-standard tools.

Participants will learn the fundamentals of React, component-based architecture, state management, routing, and project deployment. By the end of the bootcamp, students will be able to create modern single-page applications and improve their frontend development skills. (Participation certificate for all students)

sessions.details:
Topics Covered:
Introduction to React JS and its importance
Understanding Single Page Applications (SPA)
Setting up React development environment
Introduction to JSX syntax
Understanding Components in React
Functional Components vs Class Components
Props and component reusability
State management basics using useState
Handling events in React
Creating simple interactive UI applications
Folder structure and project organization
Hands-on mini project practice
sessions.session_name: Session 1: Introduction to React JS & Core Concepts

sessions.details:
Topics Covered:
React Hooks (useEffect, useContext)
Conditional rendering techniques
Lists and keys in React
Form handling and validation
React Router for page navigation
API integration using Fetch/Axios
Managing application data dynamically
Styling React applications (CSS/Tailwind/Bootstrap)
Creating responsive user interfaces
Project deployment process
Building a complete React mini project
Best practices for frontend development
Career guidance and project showcase
sessions.session_name: Session 2: Advanced React Concepts & Project Development

name: Git & GitHub
description: The Git & GitHub Bootcamp is designed to help students and beginners understand version control and collaborative software development using Git and GitHub. This bootcamp provides hands-on learning experience covering Git fundamentals, repository management, branching, collaboration workflows, and project hosting on GitHub. Participants will learn how developers manage code efficiently, track project changes, and collaborate in real-world development environments. (Participation certificate for all students)

sessions.details:
Introduction to Version Control Systems (VCS)
Importance of Git in Software Development
Installing and Setting Up Git
Basic Git Configuration
Understanding Repositories
Initializing a Local Repository
Git Commands
Understanding Commit History
Practical Hands-on Exercises
sessions.session_name: Session 1: Introduction to Git & Version Control

sessions.details:
Introduction to GitHub
Creating a GitHub Account and Repository
Connecting Local Repository with GitHub
Pushing Code to GitHub
Cloning Repositories
Pulling Latest Changes
Understanding Remote Repositories
Managing README Files
Hands-on GitHub Repository Practice
sessions.session_name: Session 2: Working with GitHub & Remote Repositories

sessions.details:
Understanding Branches in Git
Creating and Switching Branches
Merging Branches
Resolving Merge Conflicts
Introduction to Pull Requests (PR)
Collaboration Workflow on GitHub
Forking Repositories
Contributing to Open Source Projects
Best Practices for Team Collaboration
Final Mini Project & Practical Implementation
sessions.session_name: Session 3: Branching, Collaboration & Open Source Workflow

name: Blockchain Technology
description:
The Blockchain Technology Bootcamp is designed to provide students with a strong foundation in blockchain concepts, cryptocurrency, smart contracts, and decentralized applications (DApps). This bootcamp will help participants understand how blockchain is transforming industries such as finance, healthcare, supply chain, cybersecurity, and digital identity management.

Students will gain both theoretical knowledge and practical exposure through interactive sessions, real-world examples, and hands-on demonstrations. The program is ideal for beginners who want to explore the future of decentralized technologies and Web3 development.
Participation Certificate will be provided to all students who successfully attend the Blockchain Technology Bootcamp.

sessions.details:
Introduction to Blockchain
What is Blockchain Technology
History and Evolution of Blockchain
Features of Blockchain:
Decentralization
Transparency
Security
Immutability
Understanding Blocks and Chains
How Transactions Work in Blockchain
Types of Blockchain:
Public Blockchain
Private Blockchain
Introduction to Cryptocurrency and Bitcoin
Real-World Applications of Blockchain

sessions.session_name: Session 2: Introduction to Web3 & Smart Contracts
sessions.details:
Introduction to Web3 Technology
Difference Between Web1, Web2, and Web3
Basics of Smart Contracts
Overview of Ethereum Blockchain
Introduction to NFTs and Digital Assets
Blockchain in Banking, Healthcare, and Education
Career Opportunities in Blockchain Technology
Future Scope of Blockchain
